title: Movie Mastermind: 2024 In Review
description: How well do you know the biggest blockbusters and brightest stars of 2024?

rounds.title: Box Office Hits 2024
rounds.description: Round 1: The biggest movies of the year.

questions.text: Who directed the 2024 MCU blockbuster 'Deadpool & Wolverine'?
In 'Inside Out 2', what is the name of the new orange emotion voiced by Maya Hawke?
Which actor played the chilling antagonist Feyd-Rautha Harkonnen in 'Dune: Part Two'?
Auliʻi Cravalho returned to voice which title character in a 2024 Disney animated sequel?
Who directed the 2024 musical film adaptation of 'Wicked'?
In 'Inside Out 2', what is the first name of the teenage girl whose mind serves as the film's setting?
Which actor made a surprise return as his former character Johnny Storm in 'Deadpool & Wolverine'?
Which director helmed the 2024 science fiction epic 'Dune: Part Two'?
Which singer and actress plays the role of Glinda the Good in 'Wicked'?
Which actor voices the powerful demigod Maui in 'Moana 2'?

rounds.title: Stars & Directors 2024
rounds.description: Round 2: Names behind the cameras and the faces on screen.

questions.text: Who directed the 2024 animated hit 'Despicable Me 4'?
Which director helmed the live-action/CGI prequel 'Mufasa: The Lion King'?
Which actor voices Po in 'Kung Fu Panda 4'?
Who directed the long-awaited sequel 'Beetlejuice Beetlejuice'?
Which legendary director returned to the arena to helm 'Gladiator II'?
Who directed the 2024 disaster film sequel 'Twisters'?
Which actor stars as the main character Lucius in 'Gladiator II'?
In 'Sonic the Hedgehog 3', which actor provides the voice for the character Shadow?
Who directed the 2024 film 'Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes'?
Which actor stars as Mike Lowrey in the 2024 sequel 'Bad Boys: Ride or Die'?

rounds.title: Film Trivia Mix
rounds.description: Round 3: A mix of ordering, true/false, and fun facts.

questions.text: Place these 2024 films in order of their domestic release (Earliest to Latest).
True or False: In Moana 2, the title character is voiced by Zendaya.
Which of these is NOT one of the new emotions introduced in 'Inside Out 2'?
Sort these 2024 films by their approximate worldwide box office gross (Highest to Lowest).
True or False: The 2024 film 'Twisters' is a sequel to the 1996 film 'Twister'.
In 'Dune: Part Two', what is the name of the spice-rich desert planet?
True or False: 'Gladiator II' was released exactly 10 years after the original 2000 film.
Place these 2024 film stars in alphabetical order of their LAST names.
True or False: 'Inside Out 2' became the highest-grossing animated film of all time during its 2024 run.
Which legendary actor plays the Wizard of Oz in the 2024 film 'Wicked'?

rounds.title: Supporting Stars & Roles
rounds.description: Round 4: The essential supporting cast of 2024's biggest films.

questions.text: Which actor plays the Dean of Shiz University, Madame Morrible, in the 2024 film 'Wicked'?
In 'Dune: Part Two', which actor portrays Princess Irulan, the Emperor's daughter?
Who plays the character Gurney Halleck, Paul's mentor and friend, in 'Dune: Part Two'?
Which actress voices the emotion Disgust in 'Inside Out 2', taking over the role from Mindy Kaling?
In 'Deadpool & Wolverine', which actor returns as the fan-favorite character Peter?
Which actor voices the emotion Ennui (Boredom) in the Pixar sequel 'Inside Out 2'?
Who plays Mr. Paradox, the TVA agent who recruits Wade Wilson in 'Deadpool & Wolverine'?
Which veteran actress voices the emotion Nostalgia in 'Inside Out 2'?
In 'Moana 2', who voices the quirky craftswoman Loto on Moana's wayfinding crew?
Which actor from the original 'Gladiator' (2000) reprises her role as Lucilla in the 2024 sequel?

rounds.title: 2024 Film Potpourri
rounds.description: Round 5: A final mix of trivia from the year's diverse film slate.

questions.text: Which 2024 monster film features Godzilla and Kong teaming up against a new threat?
options: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire

questions.text: Who directed the 2024 animated sequel 'Kung Fu Panda 4'?
Which 2024 film serves as a direct sequel to Tim Burton's 1988 classic 'Beetlejuice'?
In 'Despicable Me 4', which actor voices Gru's new nemesis, Maxime Le Mal?
Which 2024 film follows a group of storm chasers in Oklahoma?
In the 2024 film 'Mufasa: The Lion King', who voices the character Taka, the future Scar?
Which 2024 film is the fourth installment in the modern 'Planet of the Apes' reboot series?
options: Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes
Dawn of the Planet of the Apes
War for the Planet of the Apes
Rise of the Planet of the Apes

questions.text: In 'Bad Boys: Ride or Die', who plays the role of Marcus Burnett alongside Will Smith?
Which actor stars as Tyler Owens, the 'Tornado Wrangler', in the film 'Twisters'?
Who directed the 2024 sci-fi film 'Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes'?
